jsonLd.title: Croma is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Croma in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!
